mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE_HANDLER ( ORG_ID, TRX_TYPE, IO_TYPE, OPER_MODE_TYPE, HANDLER, HANDLER_DESC, STOP_YN, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.orgId}, #{dto.trxType}, #{dto.ioType}, #{dto.operModeType}, #{dto.handler}, #{dto.handlerDesc}, #{dto.stopYn}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
